title: TFMG: Some bugs fixes
description: this mod just fixes a few bugs from TFMG
body:
**This mod fixes a few stupid bugs from [The factory must Grow mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) (TFMG)**

This mod fixes the following bugs:

- Lack of linear dependence of fuel consumption with a long engine

- Zero fuel consumption with analog redstone (now if the fuel consumption is 0mb, the engine will not run)
- no falling out of engine parts after breaking

-  crash with empty oil can when returning null to int

- zero fuel consumption for radial_engine

You can request fixes on [Github issues.](https://github.com/Chelovechic/TFMG-Fixes/issues)
